chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-2440/2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.11985/2017 (stay) 2. For hearing of Main case 13/08/2021: Ch. Amjad Hussain, advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, Addl. A.G. Mr. Sartaj Malkani, advocate for SBCA. -.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions of his client does not press this petition as his grievance stated to have been redressed. Instant petition stands disposed of as not pressed, along with the pending application, if any. JUDGE JUDGE SM
